InspirationDef.label: contemplative
InspirationDef.beginLetter: {0} has glimpsed the Dark God and received a commandment! In pitch blackness, incessant whispers crowded in. Although indecipherable, the whispers all came from a source - an orb. It was patient, but demanding. It was plain, yet dominating. It was perfect. It commanded {0} to behold it.\n\nBlissfully enlightened, [PAWN_pronoun] is obsessed with finding deeper truths in the orb. [PAWN_pronoun] is so enthralled by it that [PAWN_pronoun] would rather die than go without the opportunity to delve into the secrets the orb offers.
